title: OpenClaw Security Risks: 6 Dangers of Autonomous AI Agents
summary: IBM Technology's Jeff Crume analyzes OpenClaw security risks affecting autonomous AI agents, discussing vulnerabilities including prompt injection, credential exposure, and risks from agent autonomy, tools, and memory. The video advocates for safer practices in deploying agentic AI systems.
